title: Implement Tickflow status and resume commands
description: Add /tickflow-status and /tickflow-resume <run-id>. Status lists active/recoverable runs, leases, worktrees, and last decisions. Resume reloads run records, skips closed/awaiting ticks, reconnects to existing worktrees, and continues safe pending work.
acceptance_criteria: /tickflow-status lists persisted runs; /tickflow-resume <run-id> can resume an interrupted dry/manual run without deleting work; closed/awaiting ticks are skipped.
